text:
Wall Sina, Goodbye is a visual novel written by , released in the sixth Blu-ray release of the Attack on Titan anime as well as the compilation light novel Attack on Titan: Lost Girls. Other articles with this name include:
Wall Sheena, Goodbye arc - The first story arc of the Attack on Titan: Lost Girls manga.
Wall Sheena, Goodbye: Side Story - A side story concluding the Wall Sheena, Goodbye story arc.
Wall Sina, Goodbye: Part One - The first OVA adaptation of the Wall Sina, Goodbye storyline.
Wall Sina, Goodbye: Part Two - The second OVA adaptation of the Wall Sina, Goodbye storyline.
